channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-780] improve parallel-scale to support hyperion run
item.description: We need to be able to run auster (at least parallel-scale) on hyperion. We should modify parallel-scale to support srun.
item.summary: improve parallel-scale to support hyperion run

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-b2_1 » i686,server,el6,inkernel #51
LU-780 test: improve parallel-scale to support hyperion run (Revision 63ec7c9fac90d8020bad5eeb900df8c539662d56)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 63ec7c9fac90d8020bad5eeb900df8c539662d56

  • lustre/tests/cfg/ncli.sh
  • lustre/tests/parallel-scale.sh
